args.goal: Add Sprint F autonomy controller module that wraps the existing TaskSpec -> planner -> pending-plan path without bypassing approval or execution controls.
requirements: Create agent_core/autonomy.py.
Define AutonomyMode with MANUAL, ASSISTED, BOUNDED_AUTONOMOUS.
Define AutonomyStopReason with at least AWAITING_APPROVAL, BUDGET_EXHAUSTED, SUCCESS_CRITERIA_MET, DENIED, VIOLATION, ERROR, DISABLED.
Define AutonomyBudget dataclass with max_cycles, max_runtime_seconds, max_mutation_steps, cycles_used, runtime_seconds_used, mutation_steps_used.
Define AutonomyCycleResult dataclass with mode, task_goal, cycle_index, plan_hash, status, stop_reason, budget_remaining.
Implement pure budget helpers that validate counters and return fail-closed denials when exhausted or malformed.
Implement a single-cycle controller function that accepts TaskSpec, mode, budget, and planner dependencies.
The controller must create at most one new pending plan per invocation.
The controller must never execute tools directly.
The controller must reuse the existing planner path and validated pending-plan submission path rather than duplicating plan creation logic.
MANUAL and ASSISTED must stop at pending-approval boundary and return stop_reason AWAITING_APPROVAL.
BOUNDED_AUTONOMOUS must fail closed for now unless an explicit feature flag is enabled.
If BOUNDED_AUTONOMOUS is gated off, return a denied/disabled result rather than silently degrading behavior.
Keep implementation deterministic except where existing optional planner selection already exists.

args.goal: Expose Sprint F slice through the command surface while preserving all current commands and their fail-closed semantics.
requirements: Update agent_core/loop.py to add task.autonomy:<json> command handling.
Update main.py command parsing to allow task.autonomy.
Payload must require task and mode fields.
Optional budget object may include max_cycles, max_runtime_seconds, and max_mutation_steps.
Malformed or empty payload must return DENIED with explicit invalid payload wording.
Normalize task using the existing TaskSpec path already used by task.plan.
Reuse existing planner selection behavior so planner metadata remains aligned with current task.plan behavior.
Return a compact structured response containing MODE, PLAN_HASH when present, STATUS, STOP_REASON, and CYCLES_USED.
Do not change existing behavior for task.plan, plan.submit, plan.approve, or plan.execute.
Do not introduce any direct execution path from task.autonomy.

args.goal: Add tests that lock Sprint F slice 1 behavior to the current approval-bound architecture.
requirements: Create tests/test_autonomy_controller.py.
Test MANUAL mode creates exactly one pending plan and returns AWAITING_APPROVAL.
Test ASSISTED mode creates exactly one pending plan and returns AWAITING_APPROVAL.
Test exhausted cycle budget is denied before any plan is created.
Test malformed task.autonomy payload is denied.
Test missing mode is denied.
Test missing task is denied.
Test BOUNDED_AUTONOMOUS is disabled/fail-closed by default.
Test controller does not invoke plan execution directly.
Test controller preserves existing single-use approval model by stopping before execute.
Where helpful, assert plan metadata still records planner source and intent through existing flow.
